sourceRefs.summary: Worker C missing data report draft.

rationale: The two research papers have real public data accessions, selected local supplement tables, and one public 2025 ChIP-seq pipeline clue, but no computational reproduction has been run and important code paths remain request-only. Therefore the correct package-level verdict is insufficient-evidence, not reproduced.

supportingEvidenceRefs.summary: 2020 H3K4me3/DSB hotspot row; data located but not computed.
2025 broad H3K4me3 row; data and supplement located but not computed.

missingEvidence.summary: Raw and processed GEO data were not downloaded or parsed into an executable analysis workspace.
2020 source code and 2025 NOMe/RNA-seq source code are request-only according to paper statements.
No statistical reanalysis, peak overlap, broad-domain calling, or temporal expression test has been executed.

perClaimVerdicts.rationale: GSE132446, GSE84689, GSE61613, and Supplementary Table S3 are located, but the overlap/correlation analysis has not been run.
Stage peak tables are downloaded but not parsed into reproduced counts or plots.
The DSB fate interpretation requires CO/NCO proxy and accessibility checks not performed in this pass.
NOMe-seq data are public, but NDR/accessibility computations have not been reproduced.
GSE242515, Supplementary Table S5, and KAS-Analyzer are located, but broad-domain calling has not been rerun.
H3K4me3/H3K27ac domain overlap is directly testable from tables or BED files, but no overlap computation was run.
Perturbation evidence requires separating Setd1b control/cKO samples and rerunning domain/expression analysis.
Temporal expression claims require RNA-seq reanalysis or structured parsing of Supplementary Table S8.
RFX2 axis claims require motif, KO, and interaction evidence checks beyond data discovery.

operationalFailures: Original source code gaps and unmaterialized large GEO data block execution.
operationalVsScientific.policy: Do not label any claim as not-reproduced or contradicted until a computed analysis disagrees with the paper under documented data/code/statistics.
